name: elm-to-gren
description: Gren-native CLI that ports Elm package graphs into compiler-validated Gren packages

scripts.test: node -e "const fs=require('node:fs');fs.rmSync('dist-test',{recursive:true,force:true});fs.mkdirSync('dist-test',{recursive:true})" && gren make TestMain --output=dist-test/tests.js && node test/run-tests.cjs && node test/mappings/property-rows.test.cjs
scripts.test:rule: cd review && elm make src/ReviewConfig.elm --output=/dev/null && node tests/extractor-fixtures.mjs
scripts.test:e2e: node -e "const fs=require('node:fs');fs.mkdirSync('dist',{recursive:true})" && gren make E2EMain --output=dist/e2e-tests.js && node test/run-e2e.cjs
scripts.dev:loop: npm run build --silent && npm test --silent && node test/ecosystem/run-canary.cjs -j 4
scripts.test:format: npm run build --silent && node test/format/run-format.cjs && node test/format/collapse-record-patterns.test.cjs
scripts.test:all: npm run check && npm test && npm run test:rule && npm run test:format && npm run test:e2e && npm run test:ecosystem && npm run test:ecosystem-browser
scripts.prepack: npm run test:all && npm run build
scripts.site:deploy: node scripts/build-site.cjs && CLOUDFLARE_ACCOUNT_ID=ba519ec59f507a523b157bc1bbcbde5f npx wrangler pages deploy site --project-name=grentify --branch=main --commit-dirty=true
